h134d5437g6559g43bag8463ga4cb0dca3802: A monster forms inside us, yet you waste time with idle chatter.
h324643d4g2a10g4e79gb527gc42586d47bd8: A monster forms inside us, and you think to be idle?
h43b1cbabg8ee0g4a5agb1b2gdd771efac4d8: I did not expect you to prove quite so... fragile.
hf5e1b874g92c7g48a6g95cega9266d4b2790: Be quick about your rest. We must hurry towards the crèche.
hdb573d96g66d8g40e0g9ff7gcb4ac602041e: We need to pace ourselves. Don't you know an exhausted warrior is an ineffective one?
hebdc561agd712g4816gbee2gc1a975915956: A cretinous notion in a complex circumstance.
h7fee5f48g1217g43ccgb3a4g738aae740983: Do you suppose the parasites inside us dare to rest? That the ghaik do not still pursue us with each peal of the bell?
h6490dfc5g46eag4c82gb060gca703d19043d: Take your rest. I will stand watch.
h93a30508g5b16g4863g967fg384898cb9a0e: Should a single tentacle split your skull, I will not hesitate to end you.
hb1155f52gdb86g492eg98c4gaf4bce231f07: We're hardly going to turn while taking a rest... are we?
hf50fed27g5ba6g4ee7ga6a4g2901022b7065: We're hardly going to turn in our sleep... are we?
h7385aee5gd1a0g4e2agb25fgab09b4511d61: The parasites inside us do not rest. Even as we speak, they defile our brains and warp our bones.
h6b20435bg1fbbg4d9cgb37egbacacfae638c: This crèche notion of yours - are you sure it's our only option?
he05d1b09g86d8g4a1bgbb45gc623a3ef51a0: I do not trust a common healer to extract a ghaik tadpole without killing its host. At a crèche, a caretaker may cleanse us - safely.
h520aad63g1eb8g416fg9a2dga03063eb6cf3: Be quick about your rest. We must locate a crèche.
hd0f769fdg2aa5g4d5cg9772g3b69d3e28ea4: I knew your kind to be fragile. But I didn't foresee the severity.
